from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Row
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, trim, lit, upper, when, regexp_extract, regexp_replace, col, substring_index
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

ALL_JOURNALS_URL = 'https://www.mdpi.com/about/journals'
ALL_APC_URL = 'https://www.mdpi.com/about/apc'
MDPI_URL = 'https://www.mdpi.com/'
MDPI_SILVER_PATH = 'abfss://apc@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/silver/MDPI Open Access Publishing/all'
Year = 2025

# Get MDPI journals

schema = StructType([
    StructField("journal_name", StringType(), True),
    StructField("issn", StringType(), True),
    StructField("title_url", StringType(), True)
])
response = requests.get(ALL_JOURNALS_URL)
soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, 'html.parser')
journal_table = soup.find("table", {"class": "journaltable new tablesorter top-border"})
rows = soup.find_all("tr")

journals = []

for row in rows:
       # Extract journal name
    journal_name_tag = row.find("td", class_="journal-name-cell")
    if journal_name_tag:
        journal_name = journal_name_tag.find("div").get_text(strip=True)
        issn_tag = row.find_all("td", align="center", style="vertical-align:middle;")
        issn = issn_tag[0].get_text(strip=True) if len(issn_tag) > 1 else None
        journal_url_tag = row.find("a")
        journal_url = journal_url_tag.get("href") if journal_url_tag else None
        journal_url = MDPI_URL + journal_url if journal_url else None
        # Append to the list
        if journal_name and issn:
            journals.append(Row(
                title=journal_name,
                title_issn=issn,
                title_url=journal_url
            ))
journals_df = spark.createDataFrame(journals, schema)

journals_df = journals_df.withColumn(
    "journal_name",
    trim(regexp_replace(col("journal_name"), "[\n*\s]+", " "))

# get mdpi journals APC
schema = StructType([
    StructField("journal_name", StringType(), True),
    StructField("APC", StringType(), True)
])

response = requests.get(ALL_APC_URL)
soup = BeautifulSoup(response.text, 'html.parser')
journal_table = soup.find("table", {"class": "journaltable new tablesorter top-border"})
rows = soup.find_all("tr")
rows = rows[1:]

journals_apc = []
for row in rows:
    # Extract journal name
    journal_name_tag = row.find("td", class_="journal-name-cell")
    journal_apc_tag = row.find("td", align="center")
    if journal_name_tag:
        journal_name = journal_name_tag.find("div").get_text(strip=True)
    if journal_apc_tag:
        journal_apc = journal_apc_tag.get_text(strip=True)
    # Append to the list
    if journal_name and journal_apc:
        journals_apc.append(Row(
            title=journal_name,
            apc=journal_apc
        ))
journals_apc_df = spark.createDataFrame(journals_apc, schema)

# Perform an inner join on 'journal_name' to combine the data
merged_df = journals_df.join(
    journals_apc_df,
    trim(journals_df['journal_name']) == trim(journals_apc_df['journal_name']),
    'inner'
).select(
    journals_df['journal_name'].alias('Journal_name'),
    'issn',
    journals_apc_df['apc'].alias('APC'),
    journals_df['title_url'].alias('Title URL')
)

# Display the resulting DataFrame
merged_df = merged_df.orderBy(merged_df['Journal_name'])

new_df = merged_df.select(
    lit("MDPI Open Access Publishing").alias("Publisher"),
    col("issn").alias("ISSN1"),
    lit("").alias("ISSN2"),
    col("Journal_name").alias("Title"),
    lit("Publisher Website").alias("Source"),
    lit("Fully OA").alias("Model"),
    lit("").alias("Model Notes"),
    col("APC").alias("APC"),
    lit("CHF").alias("Currency"),
    lit("CC BY").alias("License Types"),
    lit(Year).alias("Year"),
    col('Title URL').alias("Publisher URL"),
    lit("").alias("Imprint"),
    lit("").alias("Society")
)

new_df = new_df.withColumn(
    "PublisherID",
    substring_index("Publisher URL", "/", -1)
)

new_df = new_df.withColumn(
    "JoiningID",
    substring_index("Publisher URL", "/", -1)
)

new_df = new_df.withColumn("APC", regexp_replace(col("APC"), "[^0-9]", "").cast("int"))

desired_columns = [
    "Publisher", "ISSN1", "ISSN2", "Title", "Source", "Model", "Model Notes",
    "APC", "Currency", "License Types", "Year", "PublisherID", "JoiningID",
    "Imprint", "Society"
]

# Reorder the columns based on desired schema
df_reordered = new_df.select([col for col in desired_columns if col in new_df.columns])
